name: FDM 3D Print Job
description: Workflow for FDM (Fused Deposition Modeling) 3D printing on Prusa printers

steps.description: Confirm patron has completed FDM orientation training
steps.notes: Phase 2: check local training registry file

steps.description: Receive file from patron; load into slicer software
Slice file; check for errors, supports, and infill; review and agree settings with patron
steps.notes: Verify orientation, support generation, infill percentage

steps.description: Provide estimated print duration and material cost to patron
steps.notes: Duration and material usage from slicer output

steps.description: Update booking duration in LibCal to match slicer estimate
steps.notes: Phase 2: PATCH request to LibCal API

steps.description: Set up printer: load filament, clean and level bed. For multicolour (AMS): load all required colours
steps.notes: AMS = Automatic Material System (multicolour capable on Core One, XL)

steps.description: Send sliced file to printer; start print job
steps.notes: Transfer via SD card, USB, or network depending on printer model
Phase 1: show estimated completion time. Phase 2: live countdown timer

steps.description: Remove completed parts from build plate; clean bed
steps.notes: Allow bed to cool before removal if necessary

steps.description: Record in ordering log: material weight, price, patron information
steps.notes: Ordering log is SharePoint/Excel - manual entry, no API access

steps.description: Provide patron with order number for payment at front desk
